raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 54,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atzinaja wiꞥſch drihs
to Puuti / kas winna Bruņnas
neſte / un faẓẓija us to : Jewelz
tawu Sohbinu/un noḱauji mann/
ka no man ne tohp faẓẓihts/weena
Seewa irr winnu nokawuſt / un
winna Puuſis noduhre winnu /
ka wiꞥſch nōmirre.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 55,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu Israēta Wiḣri re-
dseja/ka Abimeleks bija nomirris/
tad gabje tee ikkatrs us sawu
Weetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 56,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta mafaja Deews Abi-
melekam to Launu / fo wiꞥſch bij
pee sawa Tehwa darrijs / kad
wiꞥſch sawus ſeptisdefmits
Brahtus nokawe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 57,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſfu Launu atmak-
faja Deews teem Wiḣreem no Si-
kema us winnu Galwahn / un
Jotama Jerub-Baila Dehla
Lahsti nahze pahr teem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta X. Vodalla.
Tolus teesa Israēlu 23. Gaddus: 1. Jāirs
22. Gaddus: 3. Lee Laudis dsenn atkat El.
kadeewibu : 6. Tadeht foḣda Deews tohs
zaur teem Wilistereem un Amoritereem : 7.
Bet pehz/ka Deews tohs us Atgreeſchanu no
Grehkeem stipri paſkubbinajis: 11 / 14. Scheh-
lo wiꞥſch tohs atkat: 15. &c.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N pehz Abimeleku zeh-
lahs Tolus / Puuſ Do-
dus Dehla Dehls/weena
Wihrs no Ihsaschara Israēlu is-
pestiht / un dshwoja Samirā us
Eetwraima Kalneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch teefaja Israēlu
otwidefmits un trihs Gaddus/un
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un pehz winnu zehlahs Jāirs
tas Gileaditerts/ un teefaja Isra-
elu dividefmits un divi Gaddus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tam bija trihsdefmits
Dehli / jahdanui us trihsdefmits
Ehseta-Kiummeteem/ un teem bij
trihsdefmits Pilefahti/ ko tee no-
fanze Jaira Zeenuis / lihds schat
Deenai / kas irr eekſch Gileadas
Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jāirs nomirre/ un tap-
pe Kamona aprakts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad darrija Israēta Behr-
ni atkat/ kas tam KUNGAM ne
patikfe/ un kalpoja teem Baalim
un Astarotam / un to Sihreeu
Deeweem / un teem Deetweem no
Zihdoxa / un teem Deeweem no
Moaba/un to Ammona Behrnu
Deeweem/un to Wihlisteru Dee-
weem / un atstahje to KUNGII/
un ne kalpoja winnam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad eedusmojahs tas KUNgs
prett Israēlu/ un wiꞥſch pahrde-
we tohs to Wihlisteru Rohkā/un
Ammona Behrnu Rohkā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee fatreeze un faminne
Israēta Behrnuſ tanni Gaddā/
aſtonpadefmits Gaddus (speede
tee) wiſſus Israēta Behrnuſ/
kas winnpufs Jardanas toAmo-
riteeu Semmē bija/ kas irr Gile-
ada.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Ammona Behrni gabje
pahr to Jardanu/un karroja prett
Juhdu / un prett Benjaminu/un
prett Eetwraima Nammu / ta ka
Israētam fohti baii bija.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
